statement: In every magma, Equation 2026 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * (w * z)`) implies Equation 4652 (`(x * y) * x = (z * w) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0084
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) (op w z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op (op x y) x) = (op (op z w) w)
